title: Roasted Ethiopian Sugar Bowl
description: A delicious, pillowy, kid-friendly Ethiopian dish featuring sugars, perfect for a quick weeknight dinner. Simply roast the ingredients in the oven and serve over injera bread.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the granulated sugar, brown sugar, and honey until well combined.
Add the cardamom, cinnamon, and nutmeg to the sugar mixture and stir to combine.
Cut the injera bread into small pieces and add to the sugar mixture, tossing to coat.
Heat the ghee or vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the sugar and bread mixture to the skillet and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and roast in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
Serve the roasted sugar bowl over warm injera bread, garnished with additional honey and spices if desired.
